name: Baked Mashed Potatoes/Crispy Potato Skins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place potatoes on a baking sheet and bake until tender, about 1 hour.
3. Increase the oven temperature to 450°F.
4. Butter an 8-inch square glass baking dish.
5. Cut potatoes lengthwise in half. Scoop out insides of potatoes and place in a bowl. Reserve the skins.
6. Add 1/4 cup butter to hot potatoes and beat until smooth. Season to taste with nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
7. Beat in egg yolks, then whipping cream.
8. Spoon mashed potatoes into the prepared baking dish.
9. Cut potato skins into 1/2-inch wide strips. Place on a baking sheet.
10. Pour 2 tablespoons melted butter over skins; toss well.
11. Bake mashed potatoes and potato skins until mashed potatoes are golden and skins are crisp, about 10 minutes.
12. Mound mashed potatoes in a bowl. Top with skins and serve.
